deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27. Lien blocker resolved via notary signature April 21.
deals.next: Deliver thank you basket to Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff. Deliver gift to Joyce.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Cash deal complete.
Cleared and funded status confirmed.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Released delivered to Chicago Title same day.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo regarding lien holder. Family understanding and cooperative.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: Land listing, 20 acres, hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer stalled, clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as next offer comes in. Lead with net after close, not gross price.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment to $117,500. Exclusions locked in. Agent outreach in progress on price reduction.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer dead, no earnest money received.
Current offer stalled. Michael Rodriguez financing dead. Steve more open to overall picture on offers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO property. Work in progress. HouzzPro selected at $54,877. Work started May 9. Listing agreement needed to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Send listing agreement to Jerry and Ray. Follow up with contractors on work progress. Schedule listing once work complete.

logs.m: On-site visit with Bryce (dumpster contractor). Work active. NEW LEAD: Bryce's wife is military buyer. Get contact info.
Work officially starting. San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in person. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler. Target: work starts by Monday.
Two estimates received: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry recommended HouzzPro, real cost $62-65K.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93-143K. Double-carrying mortgage + apartment rent. Vacant 6 months, 208 DOM. Three path options identified. Must have broker call first, then pricing decision with sellers.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then call Matt and Chandler with three options: Short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.

logs.m: Stopped by property to put mail in house. Landscaper meeting scheduled for May 12. Need showing agent feedback from May 5.
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn care referral received. Still need to find buyer.
Express Offers returned $550K estimate. Likely off given actual CMA of $350-400K.
Gilberto buyers sound wishy-washy. Seller finance likely dead. Need honest price adjustment conversation.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA motivated seller relocating to North Carolina in June. Insurance claim moving forward. MLS launch Wednesday May 13. Recommended list price $259,900. Referral from Isaac Linares.
deals.next: Drop sign and lockbox Wednesday afternoon. Canvass neighborhood. Upload to MLS Wednesday May 13. Thank Isaac Linares.

logs.m: Insurance adjuster completed inspection May 11. Claim moving forward. New roof incoming. MLS launch back on track.
Listing agreement signed. Photos received from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled with Coach Ricky Smith. Foundation crack discussed with sellers on-site.
Listing consultation completed on-site with Isaac present. Sellers confirmed list price $259,900. CMA delivered. Met Isaac partner Adam at lunch.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing, development potential. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac interested in mobile home development at ~$150K. Title defect identified: incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Discuss Isaac development offer formally. Pull listing agreement to check signers.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball (co-owner) identified title defect: Deed #20100079485 incomplete legal description. Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
Isaac interested in mobile home development. Offered ~$150K. Sisters excited about development angle. Met Isaac partner Adam at lunch.
Showing occurred. Sisters updated on interest.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: New construction Lennar home, 3BR/2BA in Grace Gardens. Owner-investor renting for 2 years before occupying. WiFi included, W/D stacked unit. Recommended rent $1,595/month. Listing agreement pending.
deals.next: Send listing agreement packet to Jimbo via Skyslope. Confirm final rental terms. Get professional photos. List on rental platforms.

logs.m: Intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA analysis. Recommended rent $1,595 based on direct comp on same street.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers. Jimbo ready to move forward.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. Pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst. No HOA requirement firm. Rate buydowns and incentives angle.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach. Set up new construction search. Identify no-HOA builders in SA area.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com link for new construction browsing. Rental clock ticking.
Text from Mike: rental being sold, duplex being renovated. Assessed 916 Marriott, foundation issues, not suitable. Introduced new construction idea, they receptive.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income plus two daughters disability checks. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan eligible, zero down. Between jobs but retirement solid. Found via Nextdoor in High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Follow up tomorrow. Check on sick grandkid first. Ease back into home conversation. Connect with VA lender.

logs.m: Spoke today, she has sick grandkid. Warm conversation. Follow up tomorrow.
Confirmed military retirement and disability income stacks. Follow-up text sent mentioning VA benefits and zero down.
Connected on Nextdoor. Post: paying $1,700/mo rent, retirement plus disability, fixing credit.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Mobile home seller, acreage specialist. Church-connected community. Operating in SA area. Cross-referral partnership model. First referral: 10023 Mill Path completed. Development interest in 00 Borregas.
leads.next: Thank Isaac personally for Mill Path referral. Follow up on Borregas mobile home project timeline. Build ongoing referral system.

logs.m: Met Isaac and partner Adam for lunch after Mill Path consultation. Discussed off-market deals, bulk lots, Borregas development. Combined forces opportunity.
Mill Path listing consultation completed. Sellers positive. First referral delivered.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor near 9815 Conbes. Asked about nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers. Situation unclear: buyer, seller, or investor interest unknown.
leads.next: Call Kurt to clarify situation. Is he buying, selling, or both? Determine real estate need.

logs.m: Met Kurt, neighbor. Asked about 9815 Conbes listing intel. Details TBD.

leads.title: Colton Brown
leads.detail: Prior client, purchased Moore TX home with VA renovation loan. Going through divorce, need to finish renovation and sell. Also looking for contractor work. Connected to Kendall through prior renovation help.
leads.next: Reach out to Colton - confirm listing timeline. Get property details. Offer 181 CR 7751 contractor job. Get quote.

logs.m: Colton noted as active seller lead plus potential contractor for Priority Bank REO.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden group. Grief to healing to plants story. Real estate potential through trust-based long-term relationship. Content collaboration opportunity with permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story. Keep nurturing, no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18, finishing senior year. Interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer lead). Worth conversation about licensing path and eXp agent opportunity.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie. Intro call about licensing path and eXp opportunity.

logs.m: Referred by Julie during morning call. Jahsia interested in real estate, young and motivated.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644). Employee buyer program. Not committed to specific builder. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Open to options from multiple builders.
leads.next: Get contact info from David Roth. Pull new construction options from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar. Present options and set builder visits. Register as buyer agent first.

logs.m: Referred by David Roth as employee buyer prospect.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Not locked to any builder. Working multiple builder options. MI Homes found option under $1,200/month payment. New home sales reps pulling inventory.
leads.next: Confirm Milagros signs buyer rep agreement. Follow up on MI Homes option from Frank. Present other builder options.

logs.m: MI Homes (Frank) found home option under $1,200/month. Working multiple builders. Buyer rep agreement sent to Milagros via Skyslope.
Buyer rep agreement signed and digitally returned.

priorities.title: Close 10023 Mill Path
priorities.notes: Drop sign and lockbox Wednesday afternoon after botanical gardens. Canvass neighborhood. Upload to MLS. Motivated seller, June deadline.

followUps.text: Drop sign and lockbox at property Wednesday May 13
Canvass neighborhood Wednesday May 13
Upload to MLS Wednesday May 13
Thank Isaac Linares personally after launch

priorities.title: Resolve 340 Sollock critical situation
priorities.sub: Choose path forward: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash
priorities.notes: Underwater $93-143K. Double-carrying costs. Three options prepared. Must call broker first, then Matt and Chandler with decision path.

followUps.text: Call broker to discuss short sale protocol and guidelines
Call Matt and Chandler to present three options
Begin short sale packet if Path A chosen
Identify investor for VA assumption if Path B chosen

priorities.title: Get 181 CR 7751 listing agreement signed
priorities.sub: Send to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham before next step
priorities.notes: Work in progress with HouzzPro. Construction started May 9. Listing agreement critical next step before MLS launch.

followUps.text: Prepare listing agreement for Priority Bank
Send to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham at bank
Follow up on contractor work progress
Set listing timeline with bank once work scope confirmed

priorities.title: Activate Mike and Alice Howell new construction search
priorities.sub: Confirm pre-approval with Zach, launch builder search
priorities.notes: Rental being sold, need to move fast. Zach Schaphorst is lender. Must confirm pre-approval amount and timeline.

followUps.text: Call Zach Schaphorst to confirm pre-approval amount
Identify no-HOA new construction builders in SA
Schedule model home visits
Keep momentum while pre-approval sorts out

priorities.title: Build Isaac Linares referral system
priorities.sub: Establish ongoing off-market and bulk lot pipeline
priorities.notes: First referral delivered (10023 Mill Path). Partnership model: Isaac sends non-mobile home leads, Chris returns investor buyers. Met partner Adam Apr 21.

followUps.text: Thank Isaac personally for Mill Path referral success
Confirm Borregas mobile home project timeline with Isaac
Establish formal off-market deal referral process
Invite Isaac and Adam to community events
